Core Gameplay Loop and Win Condition

The core gameplay loop of G Switch 3 revolves around navigating a character through a series of increasingly complex levels. The game's win condition is to reach the end of each level without touching any obstacles or enemies.

Players control their character using a variety of switches that can be activated to change the direction of gravity, creating a unique puzzle-solving experience.

The game requires strategic thinking and planning ahead to overcome obstacles and reach the goal, making it a challenging and rewarding experience for players.

The controls for G Switch 3 are simple and intuitive, making it easy for players to pick up and play. On desktop, players can use the mouse to navigate and switch gravity, while on mobile devices, players can use touch controls to achieve the same effect.

The game also features a variety of power-ups and items that can be collected to aid players in their progress, such as speed boosts and extra lives.

Players can also switch between different modes, including a time-attack mode and a puzzle mode, to mix up the gameplay experience.
